acceptance_criteria:
1. Basic rendering test
2. Type-level renderer test
3. Field override test
4. Budget truncation test (NOT an error - truncation is valid output)
5. Union resolution test
6. Schema target fix test (nested value.render('json') uses nested's type)
7. Strict undefined error test ({{ value.missing }} fails with clear error)
8. .render('json') callable test
9. ctx passthrough test (ctx.max_output_chars accessible in templates)
10. Schema field order test (class fields render in declared order)
11. Compile-fail test: #[format] produces clear error message pointing to #[render]
12. All tests pass
13. Tests cover error paths
14. cargo test passes
title: Add integration tests for typed prompt rendering
